title: Battlefront (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Battlefront''''' can refer to:

==Out of universe==
===Canon media===
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]'', the [[2015]] video game by [[DICE]]
**[[Star Wars Battlefront Companion]], a supplementary mobile application
**''[[Star Wars Battlefront Strategy Guide]]'', a printed strategy guide
**[[Star Wars: Battlefront (Original Video Game Soundtrack)|''Star Wars: Battlefront I'' soundtrack]], the  soundtrack
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'', the [[2017]] video game by Dice
**[[Star Wars: Battlefront II (Original Video Game Soundtrack)|''Star Wars: Battlefront II'' soundtrack]], the soundtrack
*''[[Battlefront: Twilight Company]]'' {{C|[[Battlefront: Twilight Company (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the 2015 novel by [[Alexander Freed]]
*''[[Battlefront II: Inferno Squad]]'' {{C|[[Battlefront II: Inferno Squad (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the 2017 novel by [[Christie Golden]]

===Legends media===
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'', the [[2004]] video game by [[Pandemic Studios]]
**''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide]]'', a printed strategy guide
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'', the [[2005]] video game by [[Pandemic Studios]]
**''[[Star Wars Battlefront II: Prima Official Game Guide]]'', a printed strategy guide
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Mobile]], the 2005 mobile video game by [[Mikoishi]]
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'', the [[2007]] handheld video game by [[Rebellion Developments]]
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Mobile Squadrons]]'', the [[2009]] mobile video game by Mikoishi
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'',the 2009 handheld video game by Rebellion Developments
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront III]]'', the canceled video game by [[Free Radical Design]]
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront IV]]'', the canceled video game by Free Radical Design
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront Classic Collection]]'', the [[2024]] collection of the 2004 and 2005 video games
